title: Vanilla Sky
summary: When a withdrawn grandfather learns he has only five years remaining before facing judgement in the afterlife, he sets out to improve his ‘social impact’ by becoming a better father, friend, neighbour, and colleague. What begins as a desperate attempt to secure a place in heaven slowly transforms into something far more meaningful, forcing him to confront whether a life spent chasing the future is worth more than the relationships waiting for him in the present.
